content.en:
VisualCube魔方可视化

https://github.com/kirahan/visualcube/blob/master/Changelog.md

https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/50450208

Visual Cube是一款网页版魔方图片生成工具，全程只需浏览器，无需依托其他工具，即可生成魔方图片。目前支持的魔方有1-10阶，功能强大丰富。

Generate custom cube SVG images (vectorgraph) from browser address bar.

Source code: http://github.com/Cride5/visualcube.

在浏览器地址栏里输入特定网址来获取SVG图像(矢量图).

URL Format 网址格式

cube.rider.biz/visualcube.php?

or

vc.com/index.php?[Variable1]=[Value1]&[Variable2]=[Value2]&…

or

algs.cuber.pro/visualcube/visualcube.php?[Variable1]=[Value1]&[Variable2]=[Value2]&…

Examples 实例

Parameters 参数

Variable, Description

变量，描述

Value Range, Default, Comment

取值范围，默认值，说明

Example

实例

pzl

Puzzle Type

魔方阶数

1 to 10

[default=3]

vc.com/index.php?pzl=10

view

Special View

特殊视角

plan | trans

plan shows the sides of the top layer.

顶层视角.

trans sets the cube base color to transparent, and hides any masked or undefined faces.

立体透明视角.将魔方底色设为透明,而隐藏任何掩盖或未定义的面.

vc.com/index.php?view=plan

vc.com/index.php?view=trans

stage

Stage Mask

展示蒙版

( fl | f2l | ll | cll | ell | oll | ocll | oell | coll | ocell | wv | vh | els | cls | cmll | cross | f2l_3 | f2l_2 | f2l_sm | f2l_1 | f2b | line | 2x2x2 | 2x2x3 )-?[xyz2']*

Sets parts of the cube to be masked from being colored. The stage identifier is optionally followed by a rotation algorithm.

让魔方的一部分块被遮盖，而其他的被上色的块则是由对应阶段的公式生成的.

For example:

stage=cross-x2 would rotate the cross mask so that the cross appears on the U-layer rather than the D-layer

这个参数(x2)会旋转底层十字架，使十字架在顶层展示，而不是在底层.

vc.com/index.php?stage=f2l

vc.com/index.php?stage=cross-z'

r

Rotation Sequence

旋转序列

([xyz]-?[0-9][0-9]?[0-9]?)+

[default=y45x-34]

Each entry in the sequence is an axis (x, y or z), followed by the number of degrees to rotate in a clockwise direction. Negative values are permitted. Any number of rotations is possible.

序列中的每个参数是一个轴(x,y,或z)加上数值，表示以该数值的度数顺时针方向旋转.允许负值和任意数量的旋转.

vc.com/index.php?r=y20x-20

alg

Algorithm to apply

公式应用

[UDLRFBudlrfbMESxyz'2]*

The system applies the algorithm to the cube and displays the resulting state.

在复原的魔方上应用公式.

NOTE: Currently unavailable for 4x4 cubes or above

vc.com/index.php?alg=RUR'U'

case

Algorithm to solve case

应用公式后复原

[UDLRFBudlrfbMESxyz'2]*

The system displays the cube state which is solved by applying the algorithm (algorithm inverse).

图像应用公式后将被复原(展示的是逆算法状态).

NOTE: Only available for 2x2 and 3x3

vc.com/index.php?case=RUR'U'

fd

Facelet Definition

格定义

[udlrfbnot]*

[default=uuuuuuuuu rrrrrrrrr fffffffff ddddddddd lllllllll bbbbbbbbb]

Defines the cube state in terms of facelet positions. u stands for a 'U' facelet (and likewise with rfdlb). Defining a cube state using this method means the cube will be coloured according to the scheme defined by the sch variable. Three special characters are used to indicate the following:

n: This is a blank face (coloured grey)

o: This is an 'oriented' face (coloured silver)

t: This is a transparent face, and will not appear on the cube

vc.com/index.php?view=trans&fd=noturfdlb

vc.com/index.php?view=trans&fd=tttttttttttttttttttttttttttttdttdttdtttttttttttttttttt&alg=R2 U R'

vc.com/index.php?view=trans&fd=tututututtrttttttttttttttttttttttttttlt&alg=U M' U' M' U' M U M'

sch

Color Scheme

配色

[ndlswyrobgmp]*6

OR

Comma separated list containing 6x one of:

black | dgrey | grey | silver | white | yellow | red | orange | blue | green | purple | pink | [0-9a-fA-F]*3 | [0-9a-fA-F]*6

[default=yrbwog]

The order of the colors specified represent the faces in this order: U R F D L B.

颜色的指定按照这个顺序: 上右前下左后.

Color notation:

n=noir黑, d=dark grey深灰, l=light grey浅灰, s=silver银, w=white白色, y=yellow黄, r=red红, o=orange橙, b=blue蓝, g=green绿, m=magenta紫, p=pink粉, t=transparent透明.

vc.com/index.php?sch=pmbyog

vc.com/index.php?sch=499de9,b0c768,ecbf5f,45b99f,15ab77,fe086c

fc

Facet Colors

格色

[ndlswyrobgmpt]*

[default=yyyyyyyyyrrrrrrrrrbbbbbbbbb wwwwwwwwwoooooooooggggggggg]

Defines the cube state in terms of facelet colours, as an alternative to using fd. fc takes precedence over fd if both are defined.

As shown in the figure, the color of sticker U0 to R3 is ndlswyrobgmpt, respectively.

如图，贴纸U0到R3的颜色分别是ndlswyrobgmpt.

vc.com/index.php?view=trans&sch=dddddd&fc=ndlswyrobgmpt

bg

Background Color

背景色

[ndlswyrobgmpt]

[default=white]

vc.com/index.php?bg=m

cc

Cube Basic Color

底色

[ndlswyrobgmpt]

[default=black]

vc.com/index.php?cc=p

co

Cube Opacity

边框透明度

0 to 99

[default=100]

vc.com/index.php?cc=black&co=20

fo

Facet Opacity

格透明度

0 to 99

[default=100]

vc.com/index.php?fo=50

dist

Projection Distance

投影距离

1 to 100

[default=5]

Controls the distance of the cube from the perspective of the viewer.

控制魔方从观察者视角来看的距离.

vc.com/index.php?dist=90

arw

Arrow

箭头

<a_from><a_to>(<a_via>)?(-i[0-9+])?(-s[0-9+])?(-<color>)?

Where <a_x> is: [URFDLB][0-9]+

[default=-i10-s10].

Each arrow is defined with a minimum of two sticker identifiers to indicate where it should be drawn from and to. The optional third sticker identifier indicates which sticker it should pass through if a curved arrow is to be drawn. Arrows may be scaled so that they fall short, or past the center of each facet by specifying the s (scale) parameter after a dash. Where curved arrows are drawn the degree to which the arrow deviates from a straight path can be specified via the i (influence) parameter. Arrows may also optionally be assigned individual colors, by using a - followed by a color code.

Example: arw=U0U2,U2U8,U8U0,R6R2R0-s8-i5-yellow

The above example draws 4 arrows. The first three use default color and scale and point to stickers on the U-face. The fourth arrow points from sticker #6 to sticker #2 on the R-face and is curved so that it passes through sticker #0. The arrow is slightly shortened to 8/10 of its full length, and the influence of the pass through sticker in generating the curve is set to 5/10.

vc.com/index.php?arw=U3F7

vc.com/index.php?arw=U3F7-s7

vc.com/index.php?arw=U3F7R4

vc.com/index.php?arw=U3F7R4-i4

vc.com/index.php?arw=U3F7-p

ac

Arrow Color

箭头颜色

[ndlswyrobgmp]

[default=grey]

vc.com/index.php?arw=U3F7,U0R0&ac=p

SQ1

stage

cs | co | eo | cp | ep

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?&puzzle=sq1&stage=eo

transform

horizontal | vertical | perpendicular

[default=horizontal]

Determines the placement of the down face, horizontal places the down face to the right of the up face, vertical (= perpendicular) places the down face below.

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?&puzzle=sq1&transform=perpendicular

facespacer

面间距

0 to 100

[default=5]

Add blank space between the faces.

cubiclealgdbimagegen.azurewebsites.net/generator?&puzzle=sq1&facespacer=50

http://vc.com/index.php?bg=t&cc=l&co=20&view=trans&sch=ygrwbo&r=y30x-30&pzl=&stage=

紫色，黑色分别代码的前半和后半部分。

More Examples 更多实例

2x2

vc.com/index.php?pzl=2&r=y30x30&bg=t&fc=ddddddrgddgbwwww

vc.com/index.php?pzl=2&view=plan&sch=dddddd&bg=t&fc=wwwwgrggooooyyyyrbbbbg

vc.com/index.php?pzl=2&cc=l&co=20&sch=tttttt&r=y30x-30&bg=t&fc=yyyyttttttttssss&arw=U0U3,U3U0,D2D3,D3D2&ac=n

6×6
